commands.help: Parse a .KID file and summarize its builds and sections.
Split a .KID into a per-component KIDComponents/ tree.

args.name: output-dir
args.help: Output directory for the component tree (replaced if it exists).

commands.help: Reassemble a component tree back into a .KID.
Verify decompose→assemble reproduces the build (exit 3 on drift).
Substitute install-time IENs with "IEN" in a tree (LOSSY; review-only).

args.name: decomp-dir
args.help: A decomposed component tree to rewrite in place (LOSSY).

commands.help: Derive a .KID's reversibility class (pure-overwrite vs side-effecting) from its structure — no engine.
Run the PIKS data-class gate over a .KID (exit 3 on a blocked file).

flags.name: piks
flags.help: Path to an authoritative PIKS classification table (TSV: filenumber<TAB>class).

flags.name: strict
flags.help: Treat unclassified data files as gate failures (fail-closed).

commands.help: Build a KIDS transport global from a declarative build spec (deterministic, normalized export).

flags.name: src
flags.help: Directory holding the routine source (<routine>.m).

flags.name: out
flags.help: Output .KID path (default: dist/kids/<pkg>.kids).

args.name: spec
args.help: Path to the kids/<pkg>.build.json build spec.

commands.help: Install a built .KID on a live engine over the driver (non-interactive KIDS load+install).

flags.name: engine
flags.help: Engine to reach: ydb or iris.

flags.name: transport
flags.help: Driver transport: local | docker | remote.

flags.name: snapshot
flags.help: Capture the pre-image of any routine this install overwrites to this .KID before installing (enables uninstall --restore).

flags.name: auto-snapshot
flags.help: Like --snapshot, but to the conventional sidecar path (<kid>.preimage.kids) that uninstall auto-detects.

flags.name: allow-overwrite
flags.help: Overwrite existing routines WITHOUT capturing a pre-image (unsafe: uninstall cannot then restore them).

args.name: kid-file
args.help: Path to the built .KID transport file to install on the live engine.

commands.help: Capture the live pre-image of a patch's routines into a restorable .KID (class-1 reversal).

flags.name: engine
flags.help: Engine to reach: ydb or iris.

flags.name: transport
flags.help: Driver transport: local | docker | remote.

flags.name: name
flags.help: install name for the snapshot build (default: "<orig> PREIMAGE").

args.name: kid-file
args.help: the .KID about to be installed — the live pre-image of its routines is captured.

args.name: out-kid
args.help: output path for the pre-image snapshot .KID (what 'v pkg restore' re-applies).

commands.help: Re-apply a pre-image snapshot .KID to revert routines to stock (preview by default; --commit installs).

flags.name: engine
flags.help: Engine to reach: ydb or iris.

flags.name: transport
flags.help: Driver transport: local | docker | remote.

flags.name: commit
flags.help: DESTRUCTIVE: install the snapshot on the live engine (overwrites the live routines). Default off = preview.

args.name: kid-file
args.help: the pre-image snapshot .KID to re-apply (restore to its captured state).

commands.help: Verify a .KID's install on a live engine (#9.7 status + per-routine presence).

flags.name: engine
flags.help: Engine to reach: ydb or iris.

flags.name: transport
flags.help: Driver transport: local | docker | remote.

flags.name: drift
flags.help: Also check whether each shipped routine still matches the patch on the live engine (detects a later national patch overwriting it).

args.name: kid-file
args.help: Path to the .KID whose install to verify (its name + routines).

commands.help: Uninstall a .KID from a live engine (routine-only back-out: routines + #9.7/#9.6).

flags.name: engine
flags.help: Engine to reach: ydb or iris.

flags.name: transport
flags.help: Driver transport: local | docker | remote.

flags.name: restore
flags.help: Pre-image snapshot .KID to restore instead of deleting (class-1 reversal for a patched-over routine).

flags.name: backout
flags.help: Authored back-out .KID to install instead of deleting (class-2 reversal of a side-effecting patch).

flags.name: force
flags.help: Delete routines even for a side-effecting patch (UNSAFE: orphans install-time data/side-effects).

flags.name: verify
flags.help: After a restore/back-out, confirm the live routines now match the re-applied artifact (verify-clean).

args.name: kid-file
args.help: Path to the .KID whose install to reverse.

commands.help: Install/back out the RPC→S3 traffic-tap wrap in national CALLP^XWBBRK (preview by default; --commit ships via KIDS).
Report whether the XWBBRK traffic-tap wrap is installed (read-only).

flags.name: engine
flags.help: Engine to reach: ydb or iris.

flags.name: transport
flags.help: Driver transport: local | docker | remote.

flags.name: routine
flags.help: the broker routine to (un)patch

commands.help: Install the traffic-tap wrap into CALLP^XWBBRK (preview by default; --commit ships it via the generic lifecycle, snapshotting stock first).

flags.name: engine
flags.help: Engine to reach: ydb or iris.

flags.name: transport
flags.help: Driver transport: local | docker | remote.

flags.name: routine
flags.help: the broker routine to (un)patch

flags.name: out
flags.help: write the patched routine (.m) and its KIDS (.kids) preview to this path prefix

flags.name: snapshot
flags.help: capture the stock pre-image of the broker routine to this .KID before patching (default: the sidecar wrap-rpc backout auto-detects).

flags.name: allow-overwrite
flags.help: patch the broker WITHOUT capturing a stock pre-image (UNSAFE: wrap-rpc backout cannot then restore it).

flags.name: commit
flags.help: DESTRUCTIVE: install the patched routine on the live engine via KIDS (overwrites the national routine). Default off = preview only.

commands.help: Remove the wrap by restoring the captured stock pre-image (preview by default; --commit restores via the generic lifecycle).

flags.name: engine
flags.help: Engine to reach: ydb or iris.

flags.name: transport
flags.help: Driver transport: local | docker | remote.

flags.name: routine
flags.help: the broker routine to (un)patch

flags.name: restore
flags.help: the stock pre-image .KID to restore (default: the sidecar wrap-rpc install --commit captured).

flags.name: commit
flags.help: DESTRUCTIVE: restore stock on the live engine via KIDS. Default off = preview only.
